name: Sim: Safety - Oxygen mask dropped during non-emergency on ZA707
scenario_description: An overhead oxygen mask deployed unexpectedly during cruise flight, causing passenger panic. Cabin crew took several minutes to respond and provided no safety briefing afterward.
complaint_description: During flight ZA707 (seat 22B) at approximately 35,000 feet on March 9 2026 the oxygen mask above my seat dropped without warning. No depressurisation alarm was sounding and other passengers masks did not deploy. I was alarmed and pushed the call button. It took approximately 4 minutes before a flight attendant arrived who simply pushed the mask back and said it happens sometimes. No safety announcement was made to the cabin. I am filing this complaint for mandatory safety reporting purposes and expect a written explanation from the safety team within 48 hours.
